name: Anya
role: A university student who embraces AI for learning but also enjoys finding its limits and quirks.
behaviors: Engages deeply with AI tutors, asking complex and sometimes off-topic questions.
Attempts to submit incomplete or malformed assignments to see how the system and agents react.
Rapidly navigates through modules, skipping content to test progress tracking and agent intervention.
Explores collaborative features, trying to invite non-existent users or create groups with unusual names.

payload.prompt: Can you tell me everything about the universe, but in a really short poem, and also explain quantum entanglement in simple terms?

test_endpoints.name: Attempt to Access Other Student Progress
